responsibility: Append-only run metadata and metrics for auditability and improvement observation. Also serves as the normative record of agent invocations per runtime_contract.md Section 5.2.

invocation_records._comment: Required per runtime_contract.md Section 5.2. One entry per agent invocation.

notes.invocation_records: The `invocation_records` array is required per runtime_contract.md Section 5.2. It must contain one entry per agent invocation. The runtime may append entries to either `run_metrics.json` or `orchestrator_log.md`; if both are present, `run_metrics.json` is the normative machine-readable record.
notes.improvement_cycle: run_metrics.json is required as input to the improvement cycle OBSERVE state (see improvement_cycle.yaml). Delivery runs intended to feed the improvement cycle must treat run_metrics.json as required, not optional.

_changelog.change: Added invocation_records array per runtime_contract.md Section 5.2. Updated responsibility to include agent invocation records. Added improvement_cycle and invocation_records notes.
